atomic_facts.fact: The video features white text displayed on a solid purple background.
The text transitions from a paragraph about baking attempts to a title card.
The text mentions 'gluten-free Viennese Whirls'.

ocr: FOR ALL THOSE WHO'VE BEEN FOLLOWING....
You'll know this is my 4th attempt at making gluten-free Viennese Whirls.
The first two attempts tasted great (but looked awful).
The third attempt looked great (but tasted awful).
And then the 4th attempt conquered everything...

atomic_facts.fact: The video displays a solid purple background.
White text listing a recipe method appears on the screen.
The text contains 6 numbered steps.

ocr: 1. Cream butter, marge, vanilla & sugar together.
2. Add flours and mix in well.
3. Pipe 2 inch circles onto baking parchment.
4. Bake for 15 mins in a 190 Celsius oven.
